title: Gears & Cogs
description: A fun little Create-based modpack with lots of performance and client-side improvements.
body:
# Gears & Cogs

A fun tech, magic, exploration, and automation modpack. This is based on a port of [Sodium Plus](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sodiumplus) for Forge using [Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium), along with some other performance mods to help with, well, performance. To help with storage, I've included mods like [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage), [Pretty Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/pretty-pipes), and [Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/drawer). World generation is done with [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), as it looks incredible, and Macaw's mods give you some very nice furniture and building utilities to play around with. Dig into magic with [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania), compressing items with [PneumaticCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumaticcraft-repressurized), automating everything with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), or blasting off into space with [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra). I don't know what else to say. Have fun and good luck!

## Mod List
